items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 7 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「China's Orca world model matches specialized robotics systems without ever seeing a single action label」、「Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly running a "coordinated campaign" to steal trade secrets through poached employees」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: China's Orca world model matches specialized robotics systems without ever seeing a single action label
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：The Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence has released Orca, a world model that predicts abstract world states instead of tokens or pixels. Trained on 125,000 hours of video without a single action label, Orca matc…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol autonomously post-trained the smaller Luna model with a "fairly underspecified prompt"
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：According to OpenAI, GPT-5.6 Sol independently fine-tuned the smaller Luna model, triggered by a single "fairly under-specified prompt." In OpenAI's internal RSI benchmark for recursive self-improvement, Sol scores 16.2…

items.title: Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Large language model (LLM) training workloads increasingly run into GPU memory limits before compute is fully used. Model weights, gradients, optimizer states,...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: OpenAI staffer maps out which of GPT-5.6 Sol's five reasoning levels fits which task complexity
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：GPT-5.6 Sol ships with five reasoning levels from "Light" to "xhigh," plus "Max" and "Ultra" modes that deploy multiple sub-agents in parallel. OpenAI's Vaibhav Srivastav recommends starting low and only scaling up when…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
